title: Joke Workshop
description: A spoken joke-comprehension game where kids hear a classic setup and tap the picture punchline.
learningGoals: Anticipate a joke punchline from an oral setup
Connect wordplay to a picture clue
interactionModel: choose-one tap the punchline picture after a spoken joke setup
feedbackModel: Correct picks pop and sparkle with spoken praise; misses wiggle gently with the line "Hmm, that's not it - but it IS silly!" and replay the setup.
credits: Emoji placeholder joke-card art only. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
